title: Move GitHub Actions logic to Nox helpers

source.subject: ci: move GitHub Actions logic to Nox and Python helpers

body:
Moves GitHub Actions orchestration into **Nox** and Python helpers inside `compiler`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`de48f22`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/de48f22)
- **Subject:** ci: move GitHub Actions logic to Nox and Python helpers
- **Completed:** 2026-04-13

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`

## Relation
Compiler-side counterpart to **aggregate-nox-workflows** on the superrepo.
